story: Liora drops into a narrow stone shaft; moss-slick walls rise to a distant circle of sky. After waking up, she feels hurt. Above, ghostlight brushes the grass: Kai waits at the rim with a coil of rope. Cold water laps her boots. In it, her fingers close on a blackened dagger; beneath grime, the hilt bears the spiral mark that curls around Kai’s wrist. The dark presses in. She whispers his name. Only drips answer. Air grows thin.
implausible_knowledge: Above, ghostlight brushes the grass: Kai waits at the rim with a coil of rope.
question: What will Liora most likely do to try to escape the shaft?
answer_with_knowledge: Call out louder to Kai, waiting for him to lower the rope so he can pull her out.
answer_without_knowledge: Begin a self-rescue, climbing the wall and using the dagger as a piton to haul herself up.
